content: Redesign TUI price section in OpenBB Terminal style. Phase 1: Research OpenBB GitHub repo for TUI patterns. Phase 2: Trading team implements redesigned draw_prices() in ratatui.
Delegated OpenBB TUI research to Research Lead — Doc Researcher + SDK Analyst in parallel

Research complete. Extracted: Bloomberg amber palette (10 RGB constants), OpenBB semantic coloring (green/red/yellow for +/-/0), magnitude formatting (K/M/B), alternating row backgrounds, freshness indicators, spread_color helper. Sources: OpenBB LegacyTerminal helper_funcs.py, dark.richstyle.json, Bloomberg vim theme.
Delegated TUI redesign implementation to Trading Lead with full research findings
Delegated full TUI color/layout redesign to Rust Engine Dev — 5 parts: palette, helpers, draw_prices, all draw_* functions, verify

TUI redesigned: replaced 7 ANSI colors with 10 RGB Bloomberg palette, added spread_color/freshness_color helpers, redesigned draw_prices with alternating rows + freshness dots, updated all 6 draw_* functions for consistent amber/dim theme. cargo build + clippy clean.
TUI redesigned in OpenBB/Bloomberg style. Full RGB palette, semantic coloring, alternating rows, freshness indicators. Build clean.
